scope.question: Review source fidelity, extraction fidelity, taxonomy mapping, and safety limitations for the D+Q bone registry markdown provenance repair candidate.

outputs.summary: Completed four supervisor-agent evidence review lanes for the D+Q bone registry markdown provenance repair, set the candidate to in_review, and linked the four evidence reviews. All four lanes are complete, accepting, non-blocking, and have no open major or critical findings; the candidate was not promoted.
